title: Umami Chewy Egyptian Seafood Toast
description: A lazy Sunday Egyptian dish featuring frozen seafood mix, toast, and umami flavors, perfect for a raw-friendly and indulgent meal. This recipe combines the richness of seafood with the crunch of toasted bread and the depth of Egyptian spices.
instructions: Toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the thawed seafood mix to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Stir in the lemon juice, parsley, dill, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Spread the seafood mixture evenly over the toasted bread slices.
Return the bread slices to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the seafood is lightly browned and the bread is crispy.
Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
